I, 9 Mountain spikenard The mountain spikenard, which is called by some both thylacitis and pyritis, grows in Cilicia and Syria. It has leaves and stems resembling those of eryngo, but smaller and not in the least jagged or prickly. Its

~ var. silvestris, ~ B.
